description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building surrounded by a dense ring of mature deciduous trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features a flat roof and a minimalist, boxy design with clean lines and large window openings, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or light gray, which contrasts with the dark foliage of the surrounding trees. The house is set within a landscaped area, with the trees forming a near-complete enclosure around the building, leaving a single open approach. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The main entryway is subtly integrated into the facade, with no prominent porch or steps visible, maintaining the sleek and understated aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design, surrounded by a dense ring of leafy trees. The light-colored exterior contrasts with the dark foliage, creating a private, secluded setting.
description_view_0: The house is partially obscured by a thick row of trees, with the flat roof and some window openings visible above the foliage.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the open approach to the house, showing the main entryway and more of the building's facade through a gap in the trees.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is almost entirely encircled by trees, with only the upper portion of the structure and a few windows visible.
description_view_3: A side view showing the house nestled within the tree ring, with the flat roof and asymmetrical window arrangement visible through the foliage.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with no prominent porch or steps, integrated into the facade and accessed through a gap in the surrounding trees.
